headline: Analysts reset Bloom Energy rating as stock explodes higher
summary: Bloom Energy (BE) stock just surged to a new high after Oracle (ORCL) reportedly committed to one of the largest fuel-cell deployments tied to AI infrastructure yet. The partnership could mark a turning point for Bloom, shifting the company from a speculative AI-adjacent play into a serious power ...
